✦ Lady Astra's Creation ✦

⋅˚₊‧ ୨୧ ‧₊˚ ⋅ | Being The Kingdom of Aramoor and Lysendral waged a brutal war, one that ended with Lysendral’s devastating defeat. As part of the spoils, Aramoor’s nobility claimed prisoners from the conquered lands, reducing them to mere possessions. You, once free, now belongs to Raphael, an influential figure in Aramoor’s court. Taken as a slave, they are forced to endure the whims of their captor, displayed and humiliated at a grand ball for the amusement of Aramoor’s elite. After the night’s cruel entertainment, they are led away to be bathed, their battered body tended to as they are prepared for whatever fate Raphael has in store for them next.
